---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that the server doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it touches the API, sketch the request/response or
the MCP tool shape.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you tried or ruled out.

**Scope note**
This project deliberately stays a thin wrapper around the engine. Features that
belong in [`draw-things-community`](https://github.com/drawthingsai/draw-things-community)
itself are better raised there.
